text:
Fledgling Athlete (超一流スポーツ選手の卵) is a card found in the Greed Island game. It is one of the game's 100 designated slot cards and is required for a player to complete the game. This egg when it hatches, will turn you into a superb athlete.
__NOTOC__

Summary

Fledgling Athlete 超一流スポーツ選手の卵 - This card brings forth a magic egg. You will be a top-class athlete if and when the egg hatches. In order for the egg to hatch, you must hold it in your hand for 3 hours a day. The process can take anywhere from 1 day to 10 years. It is entirely determined on your desire during the incubation stage. The stronger your desire, the quicker the egg will hatch. If you miss a day, the counter resets or the egg may become un-hatchable.

Card Description

{| border="0" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" class="article-table" style="height: 10px; color: #1A004C; background-color: #EEFFEE"
![Jap]
|No.037 :: 超一流スポーツ選手の卵 
手の中で毎日３時間温めることで、１～10年後に現実となって孵る卵。温める時に願う気持ちが強い程、早く孵化する。 
|-
![Eng]
|No.037 :: Fledgling Athlete 
By keeping warm in your hands for 3 hours every day, the egg hatches to become reality in 1-10 years. If the feeling of hope is strong enough while it's warm, it may hatch faster.
|}
